---
title: "Bulk_rna_seq_analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{restup }

# ============================================================
# DESeq2 Analysis: OPA1 and ATF4 WT vs KO (Diet as covariate)
# Input: salmon.merged.gene_counts_length_scaled.tsv
# ============================================================

library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# ============================================================
# STEP 1: Load the count matrix
# ============================================================

counts_raw <- read.delim("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/salmon.merged.gene_counts_length_scaled.tsv",
                         row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

# Keep only the gene_name column separately, then remove it from counts
gene_names <- counts_raw$gene_name
counts_raw <- counts_raw[, -1]  # remove gene_name column

# Round to integers (DESeq2 requires integer counts)
counts_mat <- round(as.matrix(counts_raw))

# Quick check
cat("Count matrix dimensions:", dim(counts_mat), "\n")
cat("First few column names:\n")
print(head(colnames(counts_mat)))

# ============================================================
# STEP 2: Define sample metadata
# NOTE: A1 = AO_WT_HFD, D1 = AO_WT_HFD, G1 = AO_KO_HFD
#       F1 = OPA1_KO_CD, C1/E1 = OPA1_KO_HFD, B1 = AO_KO_CD
# ============================================================

# Map column names to metadata
# You may need to adjust these if column names differ slightly - 
# run colnames(counts_mat) first and verify!

sample_info <- data.frame(
  sample_id = c(
    # OPA1 WT CD
    "OPA1_WT_CD_1", "OPA1_WT_CD_2", "OPA1_WT_CD_3",
    # OPA1 WT HFD
    "OPA1_WT_HFD_4", "OPA1_WT_HFD_5", "OPA1_WT_HFD_6",
    # OPA1 KO CD
    "OPA1_KO_CD_7", "OPA1_KO_CD_8", "OPA1_KO_CD_9",
    "OPA1_KO_CD_10", "OPA1_KO_CD_11", "OPA1_KO_CD_F1",
    # OPA1 KO HFD
    "OPA1_KO_HFD_12", "OPA1_KO_HFD_C1", "OPA1_KO_HFD_E1",
    # ATF4 WT CD
    "ATF4_WT_CD_13", "ATF4_WT_CD_14", "ATF4_WT_CD_18",
    # ATF4 WT HFD
    "ATF4_WT_HFD_15", "ATF4_WT_HFD_16", "ATF4_WT_HFD_17",
    # ATF4 KO CD
    "ATF4_KO_CD_31", "ATF4_KO_CD_32", "ATF4_KO_CD_36",
    # ATF4 KO HFD
    "ATF4_KO_HFD_33", "ATF4_KO_HFD_34", "ATF4_KO_HFD_35"
  ),
  genotype_gene = c(
    rep("OPA1", 15),
    rep("ATF4", 12)
  ),
  KO_status = c(
    rep("WT", 3), rep("WT", 3),   # OPA1 WT
    rep("KO", 6), rep("KO", 3),   # OPA1 KO
    rep("WT", 3), rep("WT", 3),   # ATF4 WT
    rep("KO", 3), rep("KO", 3)    # ATF4 KO
  ),
  diet = c(
    rep("CD", 3), rep("HFD", 3),  # OPA1 WT
    rep("CD", 6), rep("HFD", 3),  # OPA1 KO
    rep("CD", 3), rep("HFD", 3),  # ATF4 WT
    rep("CD", 3), rep("HFD", 3)   # ATF4 KO
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

rownames(sample_info) <- sample_info$sample_id

# ============================================================
# STEP 3: OPA1 Analysis — WT vs KO (diet as covariate)
# ============================================================

cat("\n========== OPA1 ANALYSIS ==========\n")

# Subset to OPA1 samples only
opa1_samples <- sample_info %>% filter(genotype_gene == "OPA1")

# Match columns in count matrix
opa1_counts <- counts_mat[, opa1_samples$sample_id]

# Build DESeqDataSet
# Design: control for diet, test effect of KO_status
opa1_coldata <- opa1_samples
opa1_coldata$KO_status <- factor(opa1_coldata$KO_status, levels = c("WT", "KO"))
opa1_coldata$diet <- factor(opa1_coldata$diet, levels = c("CD", "HFD"))

dds_opa1 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = opa1_counts,
  colData   = opa1_coldata,
  design    = ~ diet + KO_status   # diet controlled for, KO_status is the comparison
)

# Filter low-count genes
dds_opa1 <- dds_opa1[rowSums(counts(dds_opa1) >= 10) >= 3, ]

# Run DESeq2
dds_opa1 <- DESeq(dds_opa1)

# Extract results: KO vs WT
res_opa1 <- results(dds_opa1,
                    contrast = c("KO_status", "KO", "WT"),
                    alpha = 0.05)

# Add gene names
res_opa1_df <- as.data.frame(res_opa1) %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene_id") %>%
  mutate(gene_name = gene_names[match(gene_id, rownames(counts_raw))]) %>%
  arrange(padj)

cat("OPA1 analysis: significant genes (padj < 0.05):", sum(res_opa1_df$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

# --- Extract OPA1 gene specifically ---
opa1_gene_result <- res_opa1_df %>% filter(grepl("^Opa1$|^OPA1$", gene_name, ignore.case = TRUE))
cat("\nOPA1 gene DESeq2 result:\n")
print(opa1_gene_result[, c("gene_id", "gene_name", "baseMean", "log2FoldChange", "padj")])

# Save full results
write.csv(res_opa1_df, "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/OPA1_KO_vs_WT_DESeq2_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Full OPA1 results saved to: OPA1_KO_vs_WT_DESeq2_results.csv\n")

# ============================================================
# STEP 4: ATF4 Analysis — WT vs KO (diet as covariate)
# ============================================================

cat("\n========== ATF4 ANALYSIS ==========\n")

atf4_samples <- sample_info %>% filter(genotype_gene == "ATF4")
atf4_counts  <- counts_mat[, atf4_samples$sample_id]

atf4_coldata <- atf4_samples
atf4_coldata$KO_status <- factor(atf4_coldata$KO_status, levels = c("WT", "KO"))
atf4_coldata$diet      <- factor(atf4_coldata$diet, levels = c("CD", "HFD"))

dds_atf4 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = atf4_counts,
  colData   = atf4_coldata,
  design    = ~ diet + KO_status
)

dds_atf4 <- dds_atf4[rowSums(counts(dds_atf4) >= 10) >= 3, ]
dds_atf4 <- DESeq(dds_atf4)

res_atf4 <- results(dds_atf4,
                    contrast = c("KO_status", "KO", "WT"),
                    alpha = 0.05)

res_atf4_df <- as.data.frame(res_atf4) %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene_id") %>%
  mutate(gene_name = gene_names[match(gene_id, rownames(counts_raw))]) %>%
  arrange(padj)

cat("ATF4 analysis: significant genes (padj < 0.05):", sum(res_atf4_df$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

# --- Extract ATF4 gene specifically ---
atf4_gene_result <- res_atf4_df %>% filter(grepl("^Atf4$|^ATF4$", gene_name, ignore.case = TRUE))
cat("\nATF4 gene DESeq2 result:\n")
print(atf4_gene_result[, c("gene_id", "gene_name", "baseMean", "log2FoldChange", "padj")])

write.csv(res_atf4_df, "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/ATF4_KO_vs_WT_DESeq2_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Full ATF4 results saved to: ATF4_KO_vs_WT_DESeq2_results.csv\n")

# ============================================================
# STEP 5: Normalized count plots for OPA1 and ATF4 genes
# ============================================================

plot_gene_counts <- function(dds, gene_id, gene_label, group_col = "KO_status") {
  norm_counts <- counts(dds, normalized = TRUE)
  
  if (!gene_id %in% rownames(norm_counts)) {
    cat("Gene", gene_id, "not found in normalized counts\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  plot_df <- data.frame(
    count     = norm_counts[gene_id, ],
    KO_status = colData(dds)$KO_status,
    diet      = colData(dds)$diet
  )
  
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = KO_status, y = count, fill = KO_status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = diet), width = 0.15, size = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("WT" = "#4878CF", "KO" = "#D65F5F")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("CD" = "black", "HFD" = "orange")) +
    labs(
      title    = paste(gene_label, "Normalized Expression: WT vs KO"),
      subtitle = "Each dot = one sample; color = diet (CD/HFD)",
      x        = "Genotype",
      y        = "DESeq2 Normalized Counts",
      fill     = "Genotype",
      color    = "Diet"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
}

# Find the gene_id for OPA1 and ATF4 in the rownames
opa1_id <- rownames(counts_raw)[which(gene_names == "Opa1")[1]]
atf4_id <- rownames(counts_raw)[which(gene_names == "Atf4")[1]]

# If mouse gene names are capitalized differently, try:
if (is.na(opa1_id)) opa1_id <- rownames(counts_raw)[grep("^Opa1$", gene_names, ignore.case=TRUE)[1]]
if (is.na(atf4_id)) atf4_id <- rownames(counts_raw)[grep("^Atf4$", gene_names, ignore.case=TRUE)[1]]

cat("\nOPA1 Ensembl ID:", opa1_id)
cat("\nATF4 Ensembl ID:", atf4_id)

# Plot OPA1
if (!is.na(opa1_id)) {
  p_opa1 <- plot_gene_counts(dds_opa1, opa1_id, "OPA1")
  if (!is.null(p_opa1)) {
    ggsave("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/OPA1_expression_WT_vs_KO.pdf", p_opa1, width = 6, height = 5)
    ggsave("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/OPA1_expression_WT_vs_KO.png", p_opa1, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 150)
    cat("\nOPA1 plot saved.\n")
  }
}

# Plot ATF4
if (!is.na(atf4_id)) {
  p_atf4 <- plot_gene_counts(dds_atf4, atf4_id, "ATF4")
  if (!is.null(p_atf4)) {
    ggsave("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/ATF4_expression_WT_vs_KO.pdf", p_atf4, width = 6, height = 5)
    ggsave("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/ATF4_expression_WT_vs_KO.png", p_atf4, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 150)
    cat("\nATF4 plot saved.\n")
  }
}

# ============================================================
# STEP 6: Summary table for OPA1 and ATF4 genes
# ============================================================

cat("\n========== FINAL SUMMARY ==========\n")

summary_df <- bind_rows(
  opa1_gene_result %>% mutate(analysis = "OPA1_KO_vs_WT"),
  atf4_gene_result %>% mutate(analysis = "ATF4_KO_vs_WT")
) %>%
  select(analysis, gene_name, baseMean, log2FoldChange, lfcSE, stat, pvalue, padj)

print(summary_df)
write.csv(summary_df, "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/OPA1_ATF4_gene_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nSummary saved to: OPA1_ATF4_gene_summary.csv\n")

cat("\nDone! Output files:\n")
cat("  - OPA1_KO_vs_WT_DESeq2_results.csv\n")
cat("  - ATF4_KO_vs_WT_DESeq2_results.csv\n")
cat("  - OPA1_ATF4_gene_summary.csv\n")
cat("  - OPA1_expression_WT_vs_KO.pdf/.png\n")
cat("  - ATF4_expression_WT_vs_KO.pdf/.png\n")


# ============================================================
# Volcano Plots for OPA1 and ATF4 KO vs WT
# Style: matches spatial DE analysis (FDR<0.05, |log2FC|>0.5)
# Run AFTER OPA1_ATF4_DESeq2_analysis.R
# ============================================================

library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)

# ============================================================
# VOLCANO PLOT FUNCTION (spatial-style)
# ============================================================

plot_volcano <- function(res_df,
                         gene_label,        # "OPA1" or "ATF4"
                         highlight_gene,    # gene name to highlight e.g. "Opa1"
                         lfc_thresh  = 0.5,
                         fdr_thresh  = 0.05,
                         top_n_label = 20) {
  
  # Prepare data
  df <- res_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(padj), !is.na(log2FoldChange)) %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_padj = -log10(padj),
      
      # Assign color category
      category = case_when(
        padj < fdr_thresh & log2FoldChange >  lfc_thresh ~ "Upregulated",
        padj < fdr_thresh & log2FoldChange < -lfc_thresh ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE                                              ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      
      # Flag the target gene specifically
      is_target = grepl(paste0("^", highlight_gene, "$"), gene_name, ignore.case = TRUE)
    )
  
  # Pick top genes to label (by padj), always include target gene
  top_genes <- df %>%
    filter(category != "Not significant") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n_label)
  
  target_row <- df %>% filter(is_target)
  label_df   <- bind_rows(top_genes, target_row) %>% distinct()
  
  # Color scheme — matches spatial plot style
  colors <- c(
    "Upregulated"    = "#D62728",   # red
    "Downregulated"  = "#1F77B4",   # blue
    "Not significant"= "grey75"
  )
  
  # Count sig genes for subtitle
  n_up   <- sum(df$category == "Upregulated")
  n_down <- sum(df$category == "Downregulated")
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = neg_log10_padj, color = category)) +
    
    # All points
    geom_point(aes(size = is_target), alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_size_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 1.5, "TRUE" = 5), guide = "none") +
    
    # Threshold lines
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_thresh, lfc_thresh),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(fdr_thresh),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
    
    # Highlight target gene with black outline
    geom_point(data = filter(df, is_target),
               aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = neg_log10_padj),
               color = "black", size = 6, shape = 21,
               fill = ifelse(filter(df, is_target)$log2FoldChange < 0, "#1F77B4", "#D62728"),
               stroke = 1.5) +
    
    # Labels for top genes
    geom_text_repel(
      data          = label_df,
      aes(label     = gene_name),
      size          = 3,
      max.overlaps  = 20,
      box.padding   = 0.4,
      point.padding = 0.3,
      segment.color = "grey50",
      fontface      = ifelse(label_df$is_target, "bold.italic", "plain"),
      color         = "black"
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Expression") +
    
    labs(
      title    = paste0(gene_label, " KO vs WT — Volcano Plot"),
      subtitle = paste0("↑ ", n_up, " upregulated   |   ↓ ", n_down, " downregulated",
                        "   (FDR < ", fdr_thresh, ", |log2FC| > ", lfc_thresh, ")"),
      x        = "log2 Fold Change (KO / WT)",
      y        = "-log10 adjusted p-value"
    ) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10),
      legend.position = "right",
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey92", linewidth = 0.3)
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# ============================================================
# LOAD RESULTS (from previous DESeq2 script output)
# ============================================================

res_opa1_df <- read.csv("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/OPA1_KO_vs_WT_DESeq2_results.csv")
res_atf4_df <- read.csv("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/ATF4_KO_vs_WT_DESeq2_results.csv")

# ============================================================
# PLOT 1: OPA1 Volcano
# ============================================================

p_volcano_opa1 <- plot_volcano(
  res_df         = res_opa1_df,
  gene_label     = "OPA1",
  highlight_gene = "Opa1",   # mouse gene name; change to "OPA1" if human
  lfc_thresh     = 0.5,
  fdr_thresh     = 0.05,
  top_n_label    = 20
)

ggsave("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/OPA1_volcano_KO_vs_WT.pdf", p_volcano_opa1, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/OPA1_volcano_KO_vs_WT.png", p_volcano_opa1, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 150)
cat("OPA1 volcano saved.\n")
print(p_volcano_opa1)

# ============================================================
# PLOT 2: ATF4 Volcano
# ============================================================

p_volcano_atf4 <- plot_volcano(
  res_df         = res_atf4_df,
  gene_label     = "ATF4",
  highlight_gene = "Atf4",
  lfc_thresh     = 0.5,
  fdr_thresh     = 0.05,
  top_n_label    = 20
)

ggsave("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/ATF4_volcano_KO_vs_WT.pdf", p_volcano_atf4, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DE_RESULTS/ATF4_volcano_KO_vs_WT.png", p_volcano_atf4, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 150)
cat("ATF4 volcano saved.\n")
print(p_volcano_atf4)

cat("\nDone! Output files:\n")
cat("  - OPA1_volcano_KO_vs_WT.pdf/.png\n")
cat("  - ATF4_volcano_KO_vs_WT.pdf/.png\n")



# Get normalized counts for OPA1 gene across all OPA1 samples
opa1_norm <- counts(dds_opa1, normalized = TRUE)[opa1_id, ]

# Print as a clean table
data.frame(
  sample      = names(opa1_norm),
  OPA1_counts = round(opa1_norm),
  KO_status   = opa1_coldata$KO_status,
  diet        = opa1_coldata$diet
) %>% 
  arrange(KO_status, diet) %>%
  print()


# Get normalized counts for ATF4 gene across all ATF4 samples
atf4_norm <- counts(dds_atf4, normalized = TRUE)[atf4_id, ]

# Print as a clean table
data.frame(
  sample      = names(atf4_norm),
  ATF4_counts = round(atf4_norm),
  KO_status   = atf4_coldata$KO_status,
  diet        = atf4_coldata$diet
) %>% 
  arrange(KO_status, diet) %>%
  print()


```
